channel.title: 吕凡 on Fan Lyu
channel.description: Recent content in 吕凡 on Fan Lyu

item.title: About me
item.description: I’m a three-years PhD student supervised by Prof. Wei Feng in the College of Intelligence and Computing, Tianjin University (TJU). I was graduated from Suzhou University of Science and Technology as a master at 2018 advised bf Prof. Fuyuan Hu. My major is Computer Application Technology, and my research focuses on Lifelong Learning and Computer Vision. At TJU, my research interests at present mainly focus on the Lifelong Learning (Also known as Continual Learning or Incremental Learning), which aims to continually learn new knowledge from a sequence of tasks over a lifelong time.

item.title: Education
item.description: [2018.9 - present]: Ph.D. candidata, Tianjin University, College of Intelligence and Computing [2015.9 - 2018.9]: M.S. Suzhou University of Science and Technology, Electronic & Information Engineering [2011.9 - 2015.6]: B.S. Suzhou University of Science and Technology, Electronic & Information Engineering

item.title: Publications
item.description: 2021 Fan Lyu, Shuai Wang, Wei Feng, Zihan Ye, Fuyuan Hu, Song Wang. Multi-domain Multi-task Rehearsal for Lifelong Learning[C]//In Proceedings of The Thirty-Fifth AAAI Conference on Artiﬁcial Intelligence (AAAI), 2021. [paper][code][slides] 2020 Chaorui Deng, Qi Wu, Qingyao Wu, Fan Lyu, Fuyuan Hu, Mingkui Tan. Visual Grounding via Accumulated Attention[J]. IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2020. [paper] Shuai Wang, Fan Lyu, Wei Feng, Song Wang.

item.title: Academic Service
item.description: Reviewer services: Reviewer of IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems Reviewer of Pattern Recognition Letters Reviewer of Electronics Letters Reviewer of Journal of Algorithms and Computational Technology
